fields.label: Lease
fields.description: Lease record that this document belongs to.

fields.label: Title
fields.description: Document title shown in search and list views.

fields.label: Category
fields.options:
Signed Agreement
Addendum
Renewal Letter
Approval
Payment Receipt
Valuation
Correspondence
Other
fields.description: Document type or business purpose of the file.

fields.label: Private File
fields.description: Private attachment stored against the lease document.

fields.label: Document Date
fields.description: Date printed or signed on the document.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.description: Date the document terms take effect.

fields.label: Expiry Date
fields.description: Document expiry or review date, if applicable.

fields.label: Version Label
fields.description: Version identifier such as Draft, Executed, or v2.

fields.label: Confidentiality
fields.description: Access classification for the attached document.

fields.label: Uploaded By
fields.description: User who uploaded the document record.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Additional context about the document or its storage.
